children.text: Demonstrates inline popover and tooltip content attached to any SDUI node. All content is rendered by the same SDUI renderer — variables, actions, maps, and conditions all work inside popovers.
Click the button to open a dropdown menu. The popover content is a styled list built from a variable array. Clicking an item selects it and the name appears below.
